paper_title: Diversity of centipedes (Chilopoda: Scolopendromorpha and Scutigeromorpha) in Xuan Nha Nature Reserve, Son La province, Vietnam

entities.description: The study focus on the diversity, composition and distribution of centipedes in Xuan Nha Nature Reserve.
